name: Gregg Lowe
background: Gregg A. Lowe joined Wolfspeed in September 2017 as President and Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, Mr. Lowe served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Freescale Semiconductor, Ltd. from 2012 until its merger with NXP Semiconductors N.V. in 2015. He previously held various executive positions at Texas Instruments Incorporated.

companies.name: Wolfspeed, Inc.
companies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
